import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 19, 
    'description': 'v19 reactive (fixed depth indexing with sliced arrays before valid_mask; tuned: detector>0.1 or dist<3 triggers follow at base 0.25 speed-match +0.15*err, linear=0.22 if aligned in safe, -8*angle facing, pure-rotate >0.35rad; OA only detector<0.2+min_front<1.0 w/ left/right bias; seek=0.85 far; backup <0.9. Uses exact config success_angle, manual safe count, full JSON contract + per-ep diagnostics. Reaches 63+ safe in test eps; continuing tuning for longer streaks toward 500.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v19 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v19 fixes depth bug, refines follow gains/speed-match/alignment logic and OA sensitivity for better persistence on dynamic target.')
